candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository contains the code (in PyTorch) for "[Pyramid Stereo Matching Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.08669)" paper (CVPR 2018) by [Jia-Ren Chang](https://jiarenchang.github.io/) and [Yong-Sheng Chen](https://people.cs.nctu.edu.tw/~yschen/).
